dialogos.texto_en: Ahhh!\nIt feels so good to move my body.
Haah, haah...
Oh? Are you alright?
Y-yeah, I'm fine, it's not a big deal.
(I say that, but honestly,\n if Yotsuba hadn't swam with me,\n I would have been left behind a long time ago.)
If you get tired, please let me know.\nPushing yourself too hard is not a good idea.
I know. I need to conserve my energy for later.
Yep. Let's go into energy-saving mode.
(Raiha and the others...they're still in\n a pretty shallow area. It's not so much swimming\n as it is playing in the water.)
(At least at that depth, I won't have to worry\n about Raiha drowning.)
It's not so bad to float in this clear blue sea,\ngazing at the bright blue sky.
I thought the water would be colder, but it's really\nquite comfortable. It's no wonder that even this\ntime of year, you can swim here. Okinawa, right?
There aren't many people swimming here,\nso it's almost like we have the place to\nourselves... UHWAA?!
Wh-what?\nWhy did you suddenly do that weird noise?
S-something...touched my foot just now...
Could it be, a shark?!
...Why would there be a shark here\nall the sudden?
Come on, in movies that have a lot of thrilling\nscenes, sharks usually appear with a pow!
The shining blue sea reflecting the dazzling sunshine.\nA man and woman play happily in the waves.
Suddenly, ominous music begins to play%p-2;――
The two turn around to see an enormous shark,\nits size seeming almost unreal!\nScreams echo out!
Oooohh...\nThe poor couple has become the meal\nof the hungry shark...
But, that's just entertainment.\nIt's not real.
Huh?! Could it be\nthat there is already a giant shark\nlurking behind us right now?!
Come on. There wouldn't be any big sharks\nthat come near a beach like this.
Um, Uesugi-san?\nPeople who say things like that\nare usually the first to become prey you know...
You watch too many movies.
Ah?!\nThere's... something behind you right now,\nUesugi-san...
Huh?
There's nothing there.\nYou're just trying to scare me%p-2;――
Waah?!
Hey, Yotsuba?!
Uwaa?!
(What's going on? Did something just drag me down?!\n Is there really a shark%p-2;――%p;)
Nngh... Nnnnnnh?!
(Yotsuba?!\n What's she doing...)
(Was she trying to surprise me?\n Oh come on, how childish.)
(For a moment, I really thought it was a shark...\n Well, as long as Yotsuba is okay.)
(Even still...)
*gasp!*
Haahh!\nHaahh...
Did I surprise you?
Obviously.\nI didn't see a Yotsuba attack coming,\nas opposed to a shark attack.
Hee-hee-hee.\nMy prank was a great success.
(She's laughing like she doesn't even have a care.\n But that's one of the things I like about Yotsuba%p-2;――%p;)
(It's one of the things\n that made me want to date her.)
Uesugi-san?
Aahhh, um...well...
Sorry.\nI got a little too close, didn't I?
It's not that big of a deal...\nWe're dating after all, so it's okay, right?
But, look!\nEveryone else is right over there!
Plus, we're in swimsuits...
Yours... It looks good on you.
Huh?
(O-oh no! Was that too sudden?!\n But, that was perfect timing, wasn't it?!)
It got hot all the s-sudden, didn't it?!\nShould we swim a little more?!
All right, let's go!\nWoo-hoo!
Ah, hey!\nWait a second!
(I'd managed to catch up to Yotsuba, who'd started\n swimming with all her might, but only after\n we got out of the water and onto the beach...)
